title: Dharma ⊗ Quantum Fields
theme: A site bridging the five Buddhist elements with the fundamental quantum fields.

files.intent: Landing page: a hero invocation, the five element↔field correspondences, and a call to contemplate.
A detailed page on each element and its dual quantum field, with formula and mantra.
About page: microcosm/macrocosm and the non-duality of quantum physics and dharma.
A stylesheet in a white-blue cosmic palette with golden-ratio spacing.
A readme describing the generated site and the element/field correspondence table.
